package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_caching_cache_miss_does_duplicate_work: Layer: Caching. Flag cache miss paths that allow concurrent duplicate recomputation for the same key.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule510PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario510Positive(records []Rule510PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
